question: Which of the following correctly matches the stages of the disaster management cycle with their primary focus areas?

options.1: Pre-disaster – relief activities; During-disaster – preparedness; Post-disaster – prevention
options.2: Pre-disaster – reconstruction; During-disaster – awareness creation; Post-disaster – early warning
options.3: Pre-disaster – rescue operations; During-disaster – policy formation; Post-disaster – forecasting
options.4: Pre-disaster – preparedness and mitigation; During-disaster – emergency response; Post-disaster – recovery and rehabilitation

question: In earthquake studies, which of the following statements best distinguishes magnitude from intensity ?

options.1: Magnitude depends on human perception, while intensity is instrument-based
options.2: Magnitude is measured by the energy released at the focus, whereas intensity refers to the degree of shaking and damage observed at different places
options.3: Magnitude varies from place to place, but intensity remains the same everywhere
options.4: Both magnitude and intensity describe the same property of an earthquake
